ModMetaData.name: More Linkable Groups
ModMetaData.author: Iyadriel
ModMetaData.description: Adds Linkable Groups support for furniture from several mods: MUS Furniture (FishingDecorative + Gothicstyle Vampire), Ponpeco Furnitures Sci-Fi, RR's Furniture pack, UF Light Industries Furniture, and Advanced Polyamory Beds. Each entry uses MayRequire so any target mod can be absent.
